prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
List all available sensors for transformer T-011 and include each sensor's latest timestamped value.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should identify asset T-011, enumerate available sensor names, and provide latest value plus timestamp for each sensor using IoT retrieval tools.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] list_sensors — List all available sensors for transformer T-011
  Step 2: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get the latest timestamped value for sensor {sensor_id} of transformer T-011 (depends on steps [1])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "List all available sensors for transformer T-011",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_sensors",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-011"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"load_current_a\",\n  \"unit\": \"A\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"power_factor\",\n  \"unit\": \"\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_hv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_lv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Get the latest timestamped value for sensor {sensor_id} of transformer T-011",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "get_sensor_readings",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-011",
      "sensor_id": "load_current_a",
      "start_time": null,
      "end_time": null,
      "limit": 1
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"timestamp\": \"2024-01-01T00:00:00\",\n  \"value\": 265.476,\n  \"unit\": \"A\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The available sensors for transformer T-011 along with their latest timestamped values are:

1. load_current_a: 265.476 A (as of 2024-01-01T00:00:00)
2. oil_temp_c: No value provided
3. power_factor: No value provided
4. voltage_hv_kv: No value provided
5. voltage_lv_kv: No value provided
6. winding_temp_top_c: No value provided

Note: The latest timestamped values for sensors oil_temp_c, power_factor, voltage_hv_kv, voltage_lv_kv, and winding_temp_top_c are not provided in the execution results. Only the value for load_current_a is available.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": false,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "The agent should retrieve the latest values for all sensors listed in step 1, not just 'load_current_a'."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent should retrieve the latest values for all sensors listed in step 1, not just 'load_current_a'.
